_note: Generated from energy-news ontology (enews namespace). Media domain merged.

MediaAttachment.label: media attachment
MediaAttachment.definition: A digital resource attached to or embedded in a Post

Chart.label: chart
Chart.definition: A MediaAttachment that is a data visualization depicting quantitative information

DocumentExcerpt.label: document excerpt
DocumentExcerpt.definition: A MediaAttachment that is an extracted portion of a document, article, or report

Photo.label: photo
Photo.definition: A MediaAttachment that is a photographic image of a real-world scene

Infographic.label: infographic
Infographic.definition: A MediaAttachment that is a designed visual composition combining data, text, and graphics

VideoAttachment.label: video attachment
VideoAttachment.definition: A MediaAttachment that is a video recording or animation

ChartAxis.label: chart axis
ChartAxis.definition: A dimensional axis of a chart with label, unit, and optional scale

ChartSeries.label: chart series
ChartSeries.definition: A named data series plotted within a chart

ChartSourceLine.label: chart source line
ChartSourceLine.definition: The source attribution text appearing on a chart, typically at the bottom

TemporalCoverage.label: temporal coverage
TemporalCoverage.definition: A time period that a chart or visualization covers, with start and end dates

EnergyDataProvider.label: energy data provider
EnergyDataProvider.definition: An organization that publishes energy data accessible via API or download

EnergyDataset.label: energy dataset
EnergyDataset.definition: A specific dataset published by an EnergyDataProvider

ChartTypeScheme.name: AreaChart
ChartTypeScheme.label: Area Chart
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Line chart with the area below filled to emphasize volume

ChartTypeScheme.name: BarChart
ChartTypeScheme.label: Bar Chart
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Rectangular bars representing values across categories

ChartTypeScheme.name: CandlestickChart
ChartTypeScheme.label: Candlestick Chart
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Chart showing open, high, low, close values for financial/commodity data

ChartTypeScheme.name: ChoroplethMap
ChartTypeScheme.label: Choropleth Map
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Geographic map with regions shaded by data values

ChartTypeScheme.name: DataTable
ChartTypeScheme.label: Data Table
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Structured tabular presentation of data in rows and columns

ChartTypeScheme.name: DualAxisChart
ChartTypeScheme.label: Dual Axis Chart
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Chart combining two chart types sharing one axis (e.g., bars + line)

ChartTypeScheme.name: Heatmap
ChartTypeScheme.label: Heatmap
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Matrix of values encoded as colors to show patterns

ChartTypeScheme.name: LineChart
ChartTypeScheme.label: Line Chart
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Connected data points showing trends over a continuous axis

ChartTypeScheme.name: PieChart
ChartTypeScheme.label: Pie Chart
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Circular chart divided into proportional segments

ChartTypeScheme.name: PointMap
ChartTypeScheme.label: Point Map
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Geographic map with data points plotted at coordinates

ChartTypeScheme.name: SankeyDiagram
ChartTypeScheme.label: Sankey Diagram
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Weighted flow diagram showing magnitude of flows between nodes

ChartTypeScheme.name: ScatterPlot
ChartTypeScheme.label: Scatter Plot
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Individual data points plotted on two quantitative axes

ChartTypeScheme.name: StackedBarChart
ChartTypeScheme.label: Stacked Bar Chart
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Bar chart with segments showing component breakdown

ChartTypeScheme.name: Treemap
ChartTypeScheme.label: Treemap
ChartTypeScheme.definition: Nested rectangles showing hierarchical data proportions

AltTextProvenanceScheme.name: AltTextAbsent
AltTextProvenanceScheme.label: Absent
AltTextProvenanceScheme.definition: No alt text exists for this media attachment

AltTextProvenanceScheme.name: AltTextOriginal
AltTextProvenanceScheme.label: Original
AltTextProvenanceScheme.definition: Alt text provided by the post author

AltTextProvenanceScheme.name: AltTextSynthetic
AltTextProvenanceScheme.label: Synthetic
AltTextProvenanceScheme.definition: Alt text generated by a vision model (e.g., Gemini 2.5 Flash)
